overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through Night City's neon-lit streets and alleys. The player moves from a main commercial boulevard past vending machines and food vendors, through narrow corridors including Fingers MD clinic, and up stairs from a dark alley back to street level. The environment features dense cyberpunk signage with Japanese characters, holographic advertisements, and atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past digital billboards and street barriers, weapon visible in lower right

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench looking at device
pedestrian in red reflective clothing walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement screen showing beverage commercial on building facade
tall vertical sign with Japanese characters HOテル and HOTEL in purple neon
yellow and black automated vendor with BURRITO XXL branding and IT'S BIG text
black metal railing with red reflective strip separating sidewalk from street
simple concrete seating structure against building wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide cyberpunk city street at night, dominated by towering digital billboards and neon signage. The player walks forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by metal barriers, passing a vending machine and a person sitting on a bench. A pedestrian in red reflective clothing approaches from the opposite direction as the camera maintains a steady walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor area with digital menu displays

events.description: turning left toward food vendor stall and away from main boulevard

agents.ego_description: approaching a street food vendor while glancing at the digital menu screens

notable_agents.action: vendor in yellow outfit and cowboy hat standing at food cart preparing items

entered.detail: metal cart with illuminated counter and various bottles/containers on display
large vertical displays showing food items and prices in blue neon light

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a street food vendor stall with glowing digital menu screens mounted on the wall behind it. A vendor in a distinctive yellow outfit stands by the cart. The scene transitions from the open boulevard into a slightly narrower commercial area as the bench and previous vending machine pass out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with medical clinic and adult entertainment signs

events.description: passing Fingers MD clinic with bright teal neon signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight alley corridors, passing under overhead walkways

entered.detail: storefront with bright teal neon outline and FINGERS MD signage, displaying provocative posters in windows
tight corridor formed by tall buildings with overhead connecting bridges and pipes
painted metal barrier along a lowered walkway section

segments.scene_description: The environment narrows into a tight alleyway flanked by tall buildings with overhead infrastructure. The player passes the Fingers MD clinic with its distinctive teal neon trim and illuminated advertising posters. The space becomes more enclosed with concrete walls and metal railings as the previous open street elements disappear from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service alley with trash and emergency stairs

events.description: discovering a dead body lying on the ground in the dark alley
ascending concrete stairs from dark alley back to main street level

agents.ego_description: walking through dark trash-filled alley, stepping over debris and ascending concrete stairs to street level

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking on the street visible at the top of the stairs

entered.detail: deceased person lying face down on concrete surrounded by trash and debris
yellow automated food vendor with red BURRITO XXL signage
steep flight of concrete steps leading upward to street level with graffiti on walls
concrete wall covered in red and blue spray paint tags

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark, trash-strewn service alley where a dead body lies on the ground near a vending machine. The environment is dimly lit with graffiti-covered walls. The camera approaches and ascends a concrete stairway, transitioning from the enclosed dark space back up to the main street level where pedestrians and vehicle headlights become visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-drenched commercial boulevard into the claustrophobic depths of a service alley before returning to the city streets. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath towering digital billboards, passing a vending machine and a pedestrian in reflective red clothing. As the camera moves forward, the open vista shifts into a narrower commercial zone characterized by a street food vendor with glowing digital menus. The environment then tightens further into a cramped alleyway, passing the teal neon trim of the Fingers MD clinic before descending into a dimly lit, graffiti-covered service corridor where a body lies near a vending machine. Finally, the camera ascends a concrete stairway, transitioning from the dark enclosure back toward the distant headlights and pedestrians of the main street level.
